name: Volcano Solid Valve Set
summary: Volcano Solid Valve Set — a cleaning accessory for keeping your device clean for purer vapour.
description: The Volcano Solid Valve Set enables vaping of dry herbs using either the Volcano Classic or the Volcano Digital Vaporiser, providing all necessary components for a versatile experience. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A clean device gives cleaner vapour and a more reliable dose.
